title: Globalization in Transition: The Future of Trade and Value Chains

summary.about: How global production and trade patterns changed from 1995–2017.
summary.audience: Global companies, trade policymakers, investors and supply-chain strategists.
summary.method: Analyzes 23 value chains across 43 countries and groups them into six structural archetypes.
summary.insights: Goods trade is less intensive, services and intangibles matter more, labor-cost arbitrage is declining and production is becoming more regional.
